summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch iteration 14 fixes. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend features working correctly: Collections page shows collection cards, clicking navigates to collection detail with all movies, each movie is clickable to detail page. Calendar page shows 27 events (7 movies + 20 series). Homepage Collections module uses horizontal scrolling like other rows.

integration_issues.issue: Widget only shows 3 movies, no series visible. This is because the on-the-air API returns currently airing shows with their original premiere dates (e.g., The Boys: 2019-07-25), not future episode dates. The filter 'first_air_date >= today' excludes all these shows.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior based on TMDB API design. The Calendar page correctly shows both movies and series because it doesn't filter by date.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/tmdb/collection/{id} endpoint - PASS (Star Wars collection with 9 movies)
Frontend: Collections page shows 12 collection cards with posters - PASS
Frontend: Clicking collection navigates to /collections/{id} - PASS
Frontend: Collection detail shows all movies (8 Mission Impossible movies) - PASS
Frontend: Each movie in collection is clickable to /movies/{id} - PASS
Frontend: Calendar page shows 27 events (NOT empty) - PASS
Frontend: Calendar shows 7 movies + 20 series - PASS
Frontend: Calendar has filter buttons (Tout, Films, Series, Anime, Mes favoris) - PASS
Frontend: Homepage Collections module uses horizontal scrolling (ContentGrid) - PASS
Frontend: Homepage Collections poster sizes consistent with other sliders - PASS
action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider modifying CalendarWidgetHome to not filter TV shows by first_air_date, since on-the-air shows have old premiere dates. The Calendar page already handles this correctly.
seed_data_creation: None needed - using TMDB API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 fixes verified: 1) Collections page fully working - shows collection cards, clicking navigates to detail view with all movies, each movie clickable to detail page. 2) Calendar page NOT empty - shows 27 events (7 movies + 20 series) with proper badges and filters. 3) Homepage Collections module uses ContentGrid for horizontal scrolling like other rows. 4) New backend endpoints /api/tmdb/on-the-air and /api/tmdb/upcoming/tv working. Note: Homepage 'Prochaines Sorties' widget only shows movies because TV shows from on-the-air API have old first_air_date values (original premiere dates, not upcoming episode dates).

features_verified.calendar_page: PASS - Shows 27 events (7 movies + 20 series), NOT empty
